prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `22806e14`.
codex_response:
Implemented `task_22806e14` as a square-based variant of the official rule: the unique 5-cell plus template contributes its color to the centers of all odd-sized filled squares, and the original plus is erased only when there are fewer than five qualifying squares. I discarded the Sonnet hint and used the Opus hint only as a starting point, correcting it in [notes.md](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_22806e14/notes.md) because the official family is square-specific rather than arbitrary-rectangle-based. No new primitive was needed.
